cves.description: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation vulnerability in DInGO dLibra software in the parameter 'filter' in the endpoint 'indexsearch' allows a Reflected Cross-Site Scripting (XSS)

Divide By Zero vulnerability in davisking dlib allows 

remote attackers to cause a denial of service via a crafted file.

.This issue affects dlib: before <19.24.7.
Out-of-bounds Write, Buffer Copy without Checking Size of Input ('Classic Buffer Overflow') vulnerability in davisking dlib (dlib/external/zlib modules). This vulnerability is associated with program
